pageContext.name: Montgomery Scott 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Lt Commander Montgomery Scott on Star Trek Chibi® Coin!  Our Chibi® Coin series for Star Trek has expanded again to include Montgomery Scotty Scott, the skilled engineer and second officer of the U.S.S. Enterprise.   This coin is made from 1oz pure silver that has been colored and shaped to show Scott in his red Starfleet uniform. The custom-made outer box complements the coin inside, which can be viewed through the large window. This allows you to display your precious collectible, untouched. However, once inside the coin is further protected by an acrylic case, so you can take a close-up view.   With only 2,000 being minted, this is a perfect piece of Trek fan treasure.  Open hailing frequencies and order today!
